_metadata.description: G.I. Joe: Sigma 6 (2005-2007) characters. All characters with 8" anime-proportioned figures or significant animated series appearances. Drastically different designs from ARAH warrant separate character records.

characters.name: Duke
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Team leader. Anime-proportioned 8" figure design drastically different from 3.75" ARAH. Multiple variants (Sea Ops, Arctic, Jet Wings, Paratrooper). Voiced by Jason Griffith

characters.name: Snake Eyes
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Ninja commando with anime-style proportions. Multiple variants (Jungle Commando, Night Ops, Ninja Armor, Arctic). Accompanied by Timber

characters.name: Heavy Duty
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Heavy weapons specialist. Anime-proportioned 8" figure. Multiple variants including Flame Thrower version

characters.name: Scarlett
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Counter-intelligence specialist and helicopter pilot. Second-in-command to Duke. Anime-style design. Rival to Baroness. Voiced by Veronica Taylor

characters.name: Spirit Iron-Knife
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Tracker and spiritual guide. Anime-proportioned 8" figure. Multiple variants including Temple Tracker

characters.name: Tunnel Rat
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Infiltration and explosives specialist. Anime-proportioned 8" figure. Voiced by Marc Thompson

characters.name: Kamakura
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Snake Eyes' ninja apprentice. Anime-proportioned 8" figure. Multiple variants including Airglide Ninja

characters.name: Long Range
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Sniper specialist. Anime-proportioned 8" figure. Standard and Desert Gear variants

characters.name: Hi-Tech
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Tech specialist with AI robot companion H.O.U.N.D. Anime-proportioned 8" figure. Standard and Weapons Expert variants

characters.name: H.O.U.N.D.
characters.notes: Sigma 6 ORIGINAL character. Hi-Tech's AI robot dog companion. Honorary Sigma 6 member. No ARAH equivalent

characters.name: Lt. Stone
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Joins team in Season 2 with Sea Titan base and Dragonhawk copter. Anime-proportioned 8" figure

characters.name: Firefly
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Soldier who betrays the team in Season 2 episode 'Revelations'. Different characterization from ARAH Firefly (Cobra saboteur). Anime-proportioned 8" figure

characters.name: Jinx
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Snake Eyes' female ninja apprentice. Reserve Sigma 6 member. Anime-proportioned design. Voiced by Lisa Ortiz

characters.name: Shipwreck
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Sailor. Anime-proportioned 8" figure

characters.name: Flint
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Warrant officer. Anime-proportioned 8" figure (toy only)

characters.name: Gung Ho
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Marine. Anime-proportioned 8" figure (toy only)

characters.name: Grand Slam
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Anime-proportioned 8" figure (toy only)

characters.name: Wet-Suit
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Navy SEAL. Anime-proportioned 8" figure (toy only)

characters.name: Lockdown
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Anime-proportioned 8" figure (toy only)

characters.name: Backblast
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Anime-proportioned 8" figure (toy only)

characters.name: Barrel Roll
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Anime-proportioned 8" figure (toy only)

characters.name: Deep Six
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Deep sea specialist. Anime-proportioned 8" figure (toy only)

characters.name: Recondo
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Jungle trooper. Anime-proportioned 8" figure (toy only)

characters.name: Leatherneck
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Marine. Anime-proportioned 8" figure (toy only)

characters.name: Lt. Torpedo
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Navy SEAL. Anime-proportioned 8" figure (toy only)

characters.name: Shockwave
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. SWAT specialist. Anime-proportioned 8" figure (toy only)

characters.name: Scott Abernathy
characters.notes: Sigma 6 ORIGINAL character. General Hawk's son. Gadgeteer genius from Hackfield Science Academy. Created robot companion Spud. No ARAH equivalent

characters.name: Spud
characters.notes: Sigma 6 ORIGINAL character. Scott Abernathy's robot dog. Can adapt in combat. No ARAH equivalent

characters.name: Cobra Commander
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. More deadly portrayal closer to comic version. Anime-proportioned 8" figure. Multiple variants (Standard, Battlefield General, Windfire)

characters.name: Storm Shadow
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Cobra ninja. Anime-proportioned 8" figure. Multiple variants (Standard, Razor Ninja, Samurai). Snake Eyes' rival

characters.name: Destro
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Arms dealer with metal mask. Anime-proportioned 8" figure

characters.name: Baroness
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Cobra operative with hologram projection technology. Rival to Scarlett. Anime-proportioned design. Voiced by Amy Birnbaum. Animated series only (no toy)

characters.name: Zartan
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Master of disguise. Dreadnoks leader. Anime-proportioned 8" figure

characters.name: Overkill
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Revamped from ARAH B.A.T. commander to Cobra's chief scientist. Gets cybernetic body in Season 2. Created Overlord Vector

characters.name: Overlord Vector
characters.notes: Sigma 6 ORIGINAL character. Massive biomechanical B.A.T. weapon with snake torso created by Overkill. No ARAH equivalent

characters.name: Ninja B.A.T.
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Ninja-style Battle Android Trooper. Anime-proportioned 8" figure

characters.name: Sky B.A.T.
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Flying Battle Android Trooper. Anime-proportioned 8" figure

characters.name: Cobra Red Ninja
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Cobra ninja trooper. Anime-proportioned 8" figure

characters.name: Buzzer
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Dreadnok with chainsaw. Anime-proportioned design (animated series)

characters.name: Torch
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Dreadnok with flamethrower. Anime-proportioned design (animated series)

characters.name: Machete
characters.notes: Sigma 6 ORIGINAL character. Dreadnok exclusive to the Sigma 6 animated series. No ARAH equivalent

characters.name: Sgt. Boulder
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Mountain scout. Anime-proportioned 8" figure (toy only)

characters.name: Desert Wolf
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Ranger. Anime-proportioned 8" figure (toy only)

characters.name: Inferno
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Anime-proportioned 8" figure (toy only)

characters.name: Short Fuse
characters.notes: Sigma 6 version. Anime-proportioned 8" figure (toy only)
